home.subtitle: Free social media downloader for almost any public link. Powered by risunCode Native Extractor and yt-dlp plugin.

share.title: Share DownAria

share.hint: Ref links help us see where the traffic comes from.

tips.tip1: Paste any video URL to start

preview.hlsPreviewUnavailableBody: HLS live preview disabled. Use Download/Merge to get the final media file.
preview.youtubePreviewUnavailableBody: 360p and audio formats can be played directly. Other YouTube video qualities stay downloadable.
preview.genericPreviewUnavailableBody: This format cannot be previewed directly. Use Download to get the final media file.
preview.downloadLimitNotice: We currently support downloads up to 892MB per file. For the smoothest experience, files under 600MB usually download best, and YouTube merge jobs may take a bit longer.
preview.facebookCarouselNotice: Facebook gallery: up to 5 images can be fetched. Visit the original post for the full album.

history.title: Download History
history.subtitle: View and manage your past downloads
history.emptyDesc: Your download history will appear here
history.clearConfirmDesc: This will remove all download history. This action cannot be undone.

privacy.title: Your privacy matters.
privacy.description: Download history is stored locally on your device only. We never collect, track, or send your data anywhere.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure your DownAria experience with theme and language controls, platform cookies, backup and storage tools, plus Discord integration settings.

discord.title: Discord Webhook
discord.description: Get download notifications in your Discord server

pwa.title: Install App
pwa.androidDesc: Use Chrome browser for best experience. Tap menu (⋮) → "Add to Home screen" or "Install app".

cookies.title: Platform Cookies
cookies.priority: Priority: Your cookie → Admin cookie → Guest mode
cookies.adminNote: Admin cookies are pre-configured for most platforms.
cookies.howToGetDesc: Install Cookie Editor extension → Go to platform → Click extension → Export as Header String
cookies.warningDesc: Using cookies may violate platform ToS. Risk includes shadow ban to permanent ban.

storage.title: Data & Storage
storage.skipCacheDesc: Bypass Redis cache for fresh results

backup.title: Full Backup
backup.description: Export as ZIP containing history.json + settings.json. Import will merge data.
backup.restoreConfirmDesc: This will restore history and settings. Duplicates will be skipped.

clear.cookiesDesc: This will remove all saved platform cookies.
clear.localStorageDesc: This will remove themes and settings.
clear.historyCacheDesc: This will remove all download history and cached results.
clear.allDesc: All cookies, settings, and cache will be deleted.

scraperCacheClear.title: Clear Extraction Cache?
scraperCacheClear.text: This will clear all locally saved extraction results.

indexedDbClear.title: Clear IndexedDB?
indexedDbClear.text: This will delete all IndexedDB data including history and cache.

seasonalClear.title: Clear Seasonal Effects?
seasonalClear.text: This will remove custom background and reset seasonal settings.

experimentalReset.title: Reset Experimental Values?
experimentalReset.text: This will reset seasonal effects, custom background, and experimental toggles to defaults.

accentColor.title: Accent Color
accentColor.description: Choose your preferred accent color for buttons and highlights

experimental.title: Experimental
experimental.description: Beta features - may change or be removed

security.title: Security & Privacy Notice
security.description: Cookies are stored locally on your device and transmitted securely (encrypted) to the server only for media processing. Your private cookies are always prioritized over shared server cookies. Using cookies to access private content may violate platform Terms of Service. Use at your own risk.

editor.placeholder: Paste cookie string (JSON, Netscape, or Header format)...

guide.title: How to get cookies
guide.subtitle: Step-by-step guide
guide.step1: Log in to the platform in your browser
guide.step3: Copy all cookie values, or use a cookie export extension

skipCache.title: Skip Cache
skipCache.description: Always fetch fresh results (bypass local cache)

backup.title: Full Backup
backup.description: Backup contains history + settings and merges on import.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Connect webhook workflows and preview notification output in one place.

header.title: Discord Webhook
header.description: Video notifications use 2 messages: link first, then metadata embed. Your webhook URL is stored locally.

tips.content: Create a channel webhook in Discord Integrations, then paste the URL here.

autoSend.title: Auto-send on download
autoSend.description: Runs only when notification is enabled and webhook URL is valid
autoSend.canonicalNote: Canonical mode is fixed: 2 messages for video (link first, then metadata embed).

preview.title: Discord embed preview
preview.note: Note: Preview updates from Embed Color and Footer fields. Real messages also include dynamic platform/title/author data.

errors.webhookHtml: Webhook error {status}. Endpoint returned HTML instead of Discord API response.

highOpacity.title: High Opacity Warning
highOpacity.text: High opacity may cause readability issues. You have been warned!

toggleExperimental.title: Enable Experimental Features
toggleExperimental.description: Access beta features and early previews

warning.title: Experimental Features Warning
warning.description: These features are in beta and may cause unexpected behavior. If you experience background flickering or blinking, try refreshing the page.

seasonalEffects.title: Seasonal Effects
seasonalEffects.particleIntensityHint: Increase or decrease total floating items (up to 200%)
seasonalEffects.fallSpeedHint: Lower = slower floating, higher = faster falling
seasonalEffects.particleOpacityHint: Make particles more subtle or more visible

backgroundControls.visibilityHint: Best on dark theme and 8% transparency

privacyPage.subtitle: We keep DownAria simple: no account required, minimal stored data, and transparent handling for extraction requests.

atAGlance.title: Privacy at a Glance
atAGlance.point1: No registration is required to use DownAria.
atAGlance.point2: We do not permanently host downloaded media files.
atAGlance.point3: You control optional cookie usage in Settings for platforms that need authentication.

dataWeProcess.title: Data We Process
dataWeProcess.urls: Submitted URLs and extraction metadata needed to return media formats and preview info.
dataWeProcess.cookies: Optional cookies that you set in Settings for private/auth-required content, handled with separate server-side rules.
dataWeProcess.operational: Operational stats for reliability and abuse protection (rate limiting, retry, and service health).

handlingData.title: How We Handle Data
handlingData.point1: Theme, preferences, and local history are stored on your device using browser storage.
handlingData.point2: Downloads are fetched from provider/CDN sources and proxied only for delivery compatibility.
handlingData.point3: Authentication lanes are applied in order: Guest -> Server -> UserProvided. Cookies from Settings are private per user, never shared with other users, and processed through a separate private path in temporary server pooling.
handlingData.point4: We do not sell personal data. Use this tool only for content you are authorized to access.

retention.title: Retention & Deletion
retention.point1: Local history and preferences stay in your browser until you clear them from Settings or browser storage.
retention.point2: Temporary extraction and operational logs are rotated and retained only for reliability and abuse prevention.
retention.point3: If you provide authentication cookies, you can remove them anytime in Settings; they are not required for public content.

security.title: Security & Responsibility
security.point1: We use request validation, rate limiting, and retry controls to keep the service stable and safe.
security.point2: DownAria is intended for personal and authorized use only. You are responsible for respecting platform terms and copyright laws.
security.point3: For security reports, open a private disclosure through the project repository maintainer.

faq.title: Privacy FAQ
faq.a1: No. Core download and extraction flow works without registration.
faq.a2: No permanent hosting. Media is fetched from source/CDN and delivered for your request.
faq.a3: Cookies are optional and scoped to your own requests only. They are not shared with other users and are only kept temporarily via a private processing lane.
faq.a4: Open an issue in the repository and include the page + policy section you want updated.

footer.prefix: Questions or privacy concerns? Open an issue at

creditsPage.subtitleLine1: DownAria is built on top of open-source tools and community-maintained technologies.
creditsPage.subtitleLine2: This page credits the stack and contributors behind the project.

builtBy.title: Built by risunCode
builtBy.description: Designed and maintained as an open-source downloader platform with both frontend and backend runtime ownership.

licenseNotes.point1: DownAria is distributed under GPL-3 and includes integrations with third-party tools and services.
licenseNotes.point2: All product names, logos, and platform trademarks remain property of their respective owners.
licenseNotes.point3: Usage must follow local laws, copyright rules, and platform terms of service.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description: Cookie lane and data handling policy

story.title: The Story
story.p1: I used to use Telegram bots to download videos from social media. Convenient - just send a link, wait a bit, done.
story.p2: But over time, I got frustrated... 😤
story.p3: So I thought: "Why not build my own?"
story.p4: And DownAria was born — same functionality, but no limits, no queue, and much easier to use. 🚀

docs.title: Documentation
docs.subtitle: Official DownAria documentation for runtime behavior, cleanup status, and FAQ.

home.title: DownAria Documentation
home.description: DownAria is a downloader platform interface for social media content. This docs area explains what the platform does, how the extraction flow works, and how to integrate the active API usage path.

socialMedia.title: Social media downloader
socialMedia.desc: DownAria helps users extract and download media from many social platforms through one simple interface.

fastExtraction.title: Fast extraction flow
fastExtraction.desc: Paste URL, read available sources and quality options, then download the exact format you choose.

localFirst.title: Local-first experience
localFirst.desc: Settings, history, and most preferences stay on-device while backend extraction handles media processing.

howItWorks.title: How DownAria works
howItWorks.step1: Paste any supported post URL into the downloader input.
howItWorks.step2: DownAria requests extraction metadata and source formats from the backend.
howItWorks.step3: Users choose quality, container, and media type based on available sources.
howItWorks.step4: Download can return direct file streaming or async job mode for heavier processing.
howItWorks.step5: Higher quality video may merge separate video and audio tracks automatically.

input.label: Input
input.desc: URL-based extraction for posts, reels, clips, videos, and multi-item media pages.

output.label: Output
output.desc: Video, audio, and image artifacts with quality labels and backend-provided filenames.

control.label: Control
control.desc: Local-first settings for theme, seasonal effects, cookies, storage tools, and history.

apiUsage.title: API Usage
apiUsage.desc: Extract, download, and async job polling examples

errorHandling.title: Error Handling
errorHandling.desc: Error envelope, retryability, and common failure codes

faq.title: FAQ
faq.desc: Answers for product behavior, privacy, and troubleshooting

settings.title: Settings
settings.desc: Manage local preferences, cookies, storage, and integrations

about.title: About DownAria
about.desc: Project story, feature overview, and ecosystem links

popularDownloaders.title: Popular Downloader Pages
popularDownloaders.description: Platform-focused DownAria pages that help people discover the main dashboard faster.

api.title: API Usage
api.description: Rich reference for integrating Backend public API (`/api/v1/*`) used by DownAria clients and external apps.

downloadModes.title: Download Modes
downloadModes.desc: Responses can be sync file streams or async jobs depending on merge/convert workload.

clientRule.title: Client Rule
clientRule.desc: Extract first, choose source second, then download with the exact media URL or merge pair.

baseUrl.title: Base URL
baseUrl.note: Production deployments should use your own Backend domain.

flowOverview.title: Flow Overview
flowOverview.step2: Read `media[].sources[]` and choose the exact source or merge pair.
flowOverview.step3: Call `POST /api/v1/download` for direct or async artifact delivery.
flowOverview.step4: When response is `202`, poll `GET /api/v1/jobs/{id}` until the artifact is complete.

endpoints.title: Available Endpoints

extract.note: Extract media metadata, source items, and available quality options.

download.note: Download selected source directly or create async job for heavier processing.

merge.note: Merge separate video and audio URLs into one final artifact.

convert.note: Convert downloaded media into another output format such as MP3.

jobStatus.note: Poll async job state until artifact becomes available.

jobArtifact.note: Stream the completed async artifact once the job is finished.

proxy.note: Proxy media streams from external CDNs directly to the browser (supports Range requests).

endpoints.binaryNote: This endpoint returns a binary file stream rather than JSON.

errors.title: Error Handling
errors.description: DownAria and Backend return structured errors so clients can decide retry logic and user-facing messages.

retryRule.title: Retry Rule
retryRule.desc: Retry only when `error.retryable` is `true`, or when timeout/upstream errors are explicitly marked as temporary.

supportRule.title: Support Rule
supportRule.desc: Always log `request_id` in client telemetry or bug reports so backend logs can correlate failures quickly.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Common questions about DownAria usage, download behavior, and platform limits.

whatIsDownAria.a: DownAria is a social media downloader interface that extracts platform media metadata, presents available quality options, and lets users download selected artifacts.

whatLinks.q: What kind of links can I use?
whatLinks.a: Use direct post/reel/video URLs from supported platforms. The extractor reads the source and returns available video, audio, and image formats when possible.

needAccount.q: Do I need an account to download?
needAccount.a: Most public content works without login. Private or restricted content may require valid cookies or platform-side access rights.

why1080pNoAudio.q: Why can 1080p download without audio in some cases?
why1080pNoAudio.a: Some platforms expose video and audio as separate streams at higher quality. DownAria will merge them when required and supported by the selected source metadata.

whyDifferentQuality.q: Why are quality options different for each URL?
whyDifferentQuality.a: Quality depends on what the source platform currently exposes for that exact post. Some posts only have SD, others include multiple HD levels.

asyncMode.q: What happens when download returns async mode?
asyncMode.a: If backend processing needs extra time, download returns a job response. The app then polls the job endpoint until the artifact is completed.

cookiesStored.a: Yes. Cookie management is local-first in your browser storage.

historyLocal.a: Yes. History and storage tools are maintained on your device unless you explicitly clear them.

controlThemes.q: Can I control themes and visual effects?
controlThemes.a: Yes. Theme, language, accent, seasonal effects, and other preferences are adjustable from settings.

extractionFails.q: Why does extraction fail for a valid URL?
extractionFails.a: The source may be region-restricted, expired, private, or temporarily blocked. Retry with a fresh URL and check platform visibility.

qualityDuplicated.q: Why does quality list look duplicated or missing?
qualityDuplicated.a: DownAria deduplicates sources based on backend metadata. If a source is missing, it usually means the platform did not expose a valid downloadable variant.

downloadStalls.q: What should I do if a download stalls?
downloadStalls.a: Retry extraction to refresh source URLs, then download again. Signed media links can expire quickly, especially on high-traffic platforms.
